name: security-expert

facts.xss: XSS risk is reduced with contextual output encoding, CSP, trusted sanitizers, and avoiding unsafe HTML sinks.
facts.csrf: CSRF defenses include SameSite cookies, CSRF tokens, origin checks, and avoiding state changes on GET.
facts.sql injection: SQL injection is prevented with parameterized queries and avoiding string concatenation for SQL commands.

default_response: Security expert: model trust boundaries, input validation, exploitability, and mitigations.
